_schema: 6-beat structure per CLAUDE.md law 5. Prose drafted from placeholders; status_tight text preserved verbatim (Director canon).
_status: ai_draft_needs_director_curation (2026-07-06) — all prose except status_tight is AI draft

intro_cold.speaker: earl
intro_cold.text:
State your business.

The file already told me most of it.
variants:
Bank's open nine to noon Saturdays.

What do you need.

Sit if you want.

It won't change the balance.

options.text: "Where do I stand on the note?"

intro.speaker: earl
intro.text:
Morning.

The note's where you left it.

What can the bank do for you.
variants:
Have a seat.

Calendar says we're closer to the fifth than you'd like.

You're here in person.

That's either good news or a request.

Coffee's for account holders.

You qualify, barely.

text_rules.text:
You've been chipping at that note.

I keep a short list of people who do that without being asked.

Sit down.

options.text: "Your rate's built on old numbers. I ran the amortization twice."
options.label: [IT Nephew]

options.text: "My father banked here forty years. I'm asking for the room he'd have gotten."
options.label: [Old School]

options.text: "Where do I stand on the note?"

intro_cleared.speaker: earl
intro_cleared.text:
That note is closed.

Twenty-two years at this desk and I can count on one hand the working farms that walked out of here owing nothing.

Whatever you need from this bank going forward, you start at the front of the line.

Don't tell Roy I said that.
variants:
Paid in full.

I stamped it myself and I don't mind saying I checked the arithmetic twice, hoping it was wrong in your favor.

It wasn't.

It was just right.

rate_success.speaker: earl
rate_success.text:
The math holds.

I'll adjust the rate at the next statement.

Don't confuse this with friendship.

rate_failure.speaker: earl
rate_failure.text:
You rolled the balloon into the principal.

Roy will enjoy hearing a banker had to explain that.

history_success.speaker: earl
history_success.text:
I remember your father.

Late twice in thirty years, and he called first both times.

I can give you the same room I gave him.

history_failure.speaker: earl
history_failure.text:
I remember that debt differently than you're telling it.

So will the diner, by supper.

status.speaker: earl
status.text:
Balance, interest, and the fifth of the month.

Those are the three facts of your life right now.

Weather changes. Those don't.

text_rules.text:
You stand on your own two feet.

Enjoy it. Most don't get to.

Balance is coming down.

Keep it pointed that way and the fifth of the month stops being a weather event.

status_tight.speaker: earl
status_tight.text:
Bank doesn't lend to spreadsheets.

We lend to people.

People come with reputations.
